description: arXiv:2607.14116v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Free-form radiology reports contain rich clinical descriptions, yet converting them for reliable segmentation remains challenging due to the inherent variability of natural language. Existing pipelines often rely on predefined organ phrases or brittle rule-based inference-time extraction, which limits their scalability to novel anatomical struct...
